caption: A screen recording captures a web browser transitioning between different pages and windows. The sequence begins with a list of names, including "Dr Presmyer," "Scott Eckert," and "Michael Loguericio," followed by a window showing a random number generator on the website "RANDOM.ORG" displaying "Dice Roller" and "You rolled 2 dice: 2". A small inset video in the corner shows a man with dark hair and a beard wearing a black shirt, with a "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo below him. The view then switches back to the "RANDOM.ORG" page, then to a list of names including "Simon Hayez" and "Nancy Rippoll," and finally back to the "RANDOM.ORG" page. Throughout the sequence, a chat window is visible on the side with messages from "glowbug27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" saying "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE!!! https://bit.ly/NzGeS6K9".
